sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Unique-value dropdown (📊): value items now render a checkbox (☑/☐) and support multi-select, OR'ing every checked value together as a single column filter. Clicking a value (or Enter on a keyboard-focused value) toggles its checkbox and keeps the dropdown open instead of replacing the filter and closing. Selecting checkboxes is mutually exclusive with typing plain text or picking a 'Cell structure' entry in the same column — whichever is used last wins and clears the other.
